# ============================================================================
# GENERATED BY PARA, PopcornSAR
# Copyright(c) 2024 by PopcornSAR Co.,Ltd. All rights reserved.
# ============================================================================
 
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
 
project(HPC_DDS_Machine)

add_compile_options(-fpermissive)
 
# ============================================================================
# This setting is required for ara::com::dds
# Please modify the section below to suit your configuration.
# ============================================================================
set(PARA_DDS_IMPLEMENTATION cyclonedds-cxx)
 
# ============================================================================
# Do NOT modify the section below.
# This setting is required only once immediately after the project command in
# the top-level CMakeLists.txt.
# ============================================================================
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/ParaSdk.cmake)
# ============================================================================

# Find the OpenCV library package
# This is required to use OpenCV functions for image processing
list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/deps/opencv")
find_package(OpenCV REQUIRED)

# ============================================================================
# LiteRT (TensorFlow Lite) SDK configuration
# Add the litert sdk into /opt/ and set the path here. This is required to use LiteRT for running TensorFlow Lite models.
# ============================================================================
set(LITERT_SDK "/opt/litert_arm_sdk_native_pi" CACHE PATH "Path to LiteRT SDK")
include_directories(${LITERT_SDK}/include)
link_directories(${LITERT_SDK}/lib)

# Add LiteRT SDK to CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH for finding absl
list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${LITERT_SDK}")
find_package(absl CONFIG REQUIRED)
# ============================================================================
 
add_subdirectory(CM)
add_subdirectory(ClientSensor)
add_subdirectory(EM)
add_subdirectory(ProviderSensor)

# Install Para SDK libraries
install(CODE "
    file(GLOB PARA_LIBS \"${PARA_SDK}/lib/*.so*\")
    foreach(LIB \${PARA_LIBS})
        get_filename_component(LIB_NAME \${LIB} NAME)
        set(DEST \"\${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib/\${LIB_NAME}\")
        execute_process(COMMAND cp -L \"\${LIB}\" \"\${DEST}\")
    endforeach()
")

# Install Para SDK External libraries (e.g. DDS)
install(CODE "
    file(GLOB EXT_LIBS \"${PARA_SDK}/external/lib/*.so*\")
    foreach(LIB \${EXT_LIBS})
        get_filename_component(LIB_NAME \${LIB} NAME)
        set(DEST \"\${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib/\${LIB_NAME}\")
        execute_process(COMMAND cp -L \"\${LIB}\" \"\${DEST}\")
    endforeach()
")

# Install Para SDK binaries (Force copy to replace symlinks)
install(CODE "
    foreach(PROG CM EM DM IDSM PHM SIGCM TBM)
        set(SRC \"${PARA_SDK}/bin/\${PROG}\")
        set(DEST \"\${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/bin/\${PROG}\")
        if(EXISTS \"\${SRC}\")
            message(STATUS \"Overwriting symlink with binary (dereferencing): \${PROG}\")
            file(REMOVE \"\${DEST}\")
            # Use cp -L to copy the file and dereference if it is a symlink
            execute_process(COMMAND cp -L \"\${SRC}\" \"\${DEST}\")
        endif()
    endforeach()

    # Install External binaries (Force copy to replace symlinks)
    foreach(PROG dlt-daemon iox-roudi)
        set(SRC \"${PARA_SDK}/external/bin/\${PROG}\")
        set(DEST \"\${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/external/bin/\${PROG}\")
        if(EXISTS \"\${SRC}\")
            message(STATUS \"Overwriting symlink with binary (dereferencing): \${PROG}\")
            file(REMOVE \"\${DEST}\")
            execute_process(COMMAND cp -L \"\${SRC}\" \"\${DEST}\")
        endif()
    endforeach()
")
